description: A letter from Faraḥ b. Ismaʿīl, probably in Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat, 5 June 1056. Deals mainly with financial matters, mentions bills of exchange, a letter sent to Ibn al-Baʿbāʿ, and sending a pouch containing 83 1/2 dinars as cash. Also talks about a sale of tin and reports the arrival of a ship from Palermo with worthless goods. (Information from Gil)
tags: Sicily, tin, suftaja, order of payment, Ibn al-Ba'ba'
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11 לפוסטאט. מוחזק בCUL & Bodl..
